base_url.description: Your Chatwoot instance root, e.g. https://app.chatwoot.com for the hosted SaaS or your self-hosted install's origin. The engine appends /api/v1/accounts/{account_id} (and, for messages, the conversation-scoped sub-path) to every request; do not include /api/v1 yourself. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

account_id.description: The numeric Chatwoot account ID to scope every request to (visible in the dashboard URL, e.g. app.chatwoot.com/app/accounts/1/...).

api_access_token.description: Chatwoot API access token (Profile Settings > Access Token for a user token, or an Agent Bot token). Sent as the api_access_token request header on every request.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the first incremental sync of conversations (e.g. 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z). Contacts use their persisted cursor when one exists; messages use message-id pagination and do not consume start_date. Ignored once a cursor has been persisted.
